description: Make brain push meaningful events to the operator via the inbox (ADR-060) instead of requiring polling. Covers task completion/failure notifications, `hex brain watch` live stream, session-start inbox summary, and daemon.toml verbosity config.

phases.description: Call `hex inbox notify` from brain daemon after task_complete, task_fail, workplan_complete, and validate regression (new issues vs prior tick). Thread priority through: info=1, urgent=2.

gate.command: cargo check -p hex-cli && cargo test -p hex-cli brain::notify

phases.name: Inbox notifications on task lifecycle

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/sched.rs daemon loop, after a queue task transitions to Completed, synchronously call the inbox-notify REST endpoint with priority=1 and body containing task kind + summary. On Failed, priority=2 + error. Plumb through a helper `notify_operator(kind, body, priority)`.
tasks.name: Task-complete notifications

tasks.description: Track last tick's validator issue set in the brain daemon state. After each validate run, diff against previous; if NEW issues appeared, emit priority=2 notification. Store prior set in ~/.hex/brain-state.json.
tasks.name: Validate-regression detection

phases.description: Subscribe to brain_tick events via SpacetimeDB WebSocket (or poll /api/events until subscriptions land). --since flag for replay.
phases.name: hex brain watch live stream

tasks.description: Add `Watch { since: Option<String> }` — already scaffolded in sched.rs. Implement the poll loop against /api/events filtered to brain_tick; print newest first. Support --since parsing ISO 8601 and humantime (e.g., '1h').
tasks.name: Implement watch subcommand

phases.description: Surface unacked brain notifications on session start. Add .hex/daemon.toml parsing for per-event toggles + min_priority.
phases.name: Session-start inbox summary + daemon.toml config

tasks.description: In `hex hook session-start`, call inbox list filtered to brain-source + unacked. Print count + top 3 subjects.
tasks.name: Session-start unacked count

tasks.description: Read .hex/daemon.toml with defaults; struct BrainNotifyConfig { on_task_complete, on_task_failure, on_validate_regression, on_workplan_complete, on_grade_drop: bool, min_priority: u8 }. Apply filters before calling notify_operator.
tasks.name: daemon.toml verbosity
